positive: Minimalist illustration of a majestic celestial whale breaching through abstract cosmic clouds. The whale has a sleek, powerful silhouette, rendered in deep indigo and brilliant teal tones, contrasting against a background gradient of soft lavender, gold, and nebula violet. The scene is composed in a central, symmetrical arrangement, with the whale dominating the upper half. Incorporate abstract bioluminescent plankton trails and geometric starburst elements that frame the main subject. Style: Modern graphic design, stylized vector art, flat design elements with deep depth illusion. High contrast, vibrant color palette, suitable for screen printing on dark fabric. Studio lighting, crisp edges, ultra-detailed.
